full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Finding a valid SVM paper under strict constraints
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: suggest me papers according to the constraints and the paper with github or kaggle or with code is suitable for reproduction and also i have a macbook pro m2 so give me according to that to train
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: It helped me narrow down SVM papers within 2009–2012 that are feasible to reproduce on CPU.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I checked each suggested paper’s year and venue manually to ensure they satisfy the exam rules.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Eliminating papers already taken by classmates
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: i will give you the list below which are took
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped filter out duplicate selections and identify remaining valid SVM options.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I compared suggestions with the shared class list to ensure no duplication.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Checking whether selected paper is pure SVM and classical ML
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is this a pure svm paper and also i think it is mentioned in the rules that like only ml not deep learning is it following that
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Clarified that the ADMM-based SVM paper is classical machine learning and does not involve deep learning.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I read the abstract and method section of the paper to confirm it focuses on convex SVM optimization.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: is it reproducible on my mac
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Confirmed that the method is linear, convex, and CPU-friendly.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I confirmed that ADMM and linear SVM can be implemented using numpy or sklearn.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: ok i choose this paper now give me the next steps according to the rules
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped me structure the GitHub repository and required JSON file properly.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: I cross-checked the JSON format with the official exam instructions before finalizing.
